---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
toc: false
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
format: 
  html:
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="_assets/index.css">

---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-content}
# Abdelkarim el Ghani
## Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist
Hi there, welcome to my portfolio.  
Feel free to explore my projects and learn more about me!

::: {.btn-container}
[Explore Projects](projects.qmd){.btn}  
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::
:::
